message:
feat(conformance): live INFO field contract + shape-vs-exact comparison

Adds a typed contract layer for live-diff tests against Redis INFO so
fixtures can declare which fields they care about and whether each is
compared byte-for-byte (Exact) or structurally (Shape — e.g. "is an
integer," "is an ISO timestamp," without pinning the value).

crates/fr-conformance/src/lib.rs (+377 / -… net)
  * Imports expand: add `BTreeSet` to std::collections; needed for
    the contract runner's "seen fields" tracking.
  * New public enum `LiveInfoFieldComparison { Exact, Shape }`.
    Exact wins byte-for-byte; Shape uses a per-field structural
    check (integer, float, semver, csv of ints, timestamp, etc.)
    so test output isn't noisy on values that legitimately differ
    between FrankenRedis and the oracle (PID, start_time_unix,
    rss_overhead_bytes, …).
  * New public struct `LiveInfoFieldContract { section, field,
    comparison }` — a single (section, field) selector + its
    comparison mode.
  * New public function `run_live_redis_info_contract_diff(config,
    suite_name, contracts, oracle) -> Result<DifferentialReport>`:
    connects to the oracle, runs INFO on both sides, walks the
    contract list, applies the per-field comparator, and emits
    pass/fail per field plus structured log evidence under
    `live_redis_info_contract_diff::{suite}` when the harness has
    a live_log root configured.
  * Supporting helpers: `split_info_sections(text) ->
    BTreeMap<String, BTreeMap<String, String>>` parses the
    Redis INFO wire format into nested maps (section → field →
    value), `compare_info_field_shape(lhs, rhs)` matches values
    against a small library of structural patterns.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs
  * New smoke cases (+70) driving `run_live_redis_info_contract_diff`
    against a vendored Redis oracle for:
      - Server section: redis_version (Exact-only pinning),
        process_id (Shape=integer), tcp_port (Exact),
        multiplexing_api (Exact).
      - Memory section: maxmemory (Exact),
        used_memory (Shape=integer), used_memory_rss (Shape=integer),
        mem_fragmentation_ratio (Shape=float).
      - Replication section: role, connected_slaves,
        master_replid (Shape=hex40), master_repl_offset
        (Shape=integer).
      - Clients section: connected_clients (Shape=integer),
        maxclients (Exact).
    Locks the INFO surface that real clients depend on against
    Redis-7 byte-level parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1516,6 +1516,48 @@ const CORE_CONNECTION_LIVE_STABLE_CASES: &[&str] = &[
     "auth_no_password_configured",
 ];
 
+const CORE_DEBUG_LIVE_STABLE_CASES: &[&str] = &[
+    // Arity error (top-level only - subcommand arity errors differ between Redis/FR)
+    "debug_wrong_arity",
+    // SLEEP (fast variants only - returns OK)
+    "debug_sleep_basic",
+    "debug_sleep_non_numeric",
+    "debug_sleep_zero_fast",
+    "debug_sleep_negative_ignored",
+    "debug_sleep_fractional",
+    "debug_sleep_very_small_decimal",
+    "debug_sleep_scientific_notation",
+    "debug_sleep_negative_scientific",
+    "debug_case_insensitive_sleep",
+    // SET-ACTIVE-EXPIRE (0/1 only - Redis accepts more values than FR)
+    "debug_set_active_expire_on",
+    "debug_set_active_expire_off",
+    "debug_set_active_expire_case_insensitive",
+    "debug_set_active_expire_multiple_toggles_on",
+    "debug_set_active_expire_toggle_off",
+    "debug_set_active_expire_toggle_on_again",
+    // DEBUG OBJECT missing key error
+    "debug_object_missing_key",
+    // Setup commands for context
+    "debug_setup_string",
+    "debug_setup_hash",
+    "debug_setup_list",
+    "debug_setup_set",
+    "debug_setup_zset",
+    "debug_setup_stream",
+    "debug_setup_hyperloglog",
+    "debug_setup_int_encoded_string",
+    "debug_setup_embstr_encoded",
+    "debug_setup_raw_encoded",
+    "debug_setup_intset",
+    "debug_setup_empty_string",
+    "debug_setup_empty_list",
+    "debug_setup_special_chars_key",
+    "debug_setup_large_integer",
+    "debug_digest_setup_keys",
+    // Non-deterministic outputs excluded: DEBUG OBJECT, DEBUG DIGEST, DEBUG DIGEST-VALUE
+];
+
 struct VendoredRedisOracle {
     child: Child,
     port: u16,
@@ -1548,6 +1590,8 @@ impl VendoredRedisOracle {
                 "127.0.0.1",
                 "--port",

             .stdin(Stdio::null())

     ));

-        "bind 127.0.0.1\nport {port}\nsave \"\"\nappendonly no\ndir {}\n",
+        "bind 127.0.0.1\nport {port}\nsave \"\"\nappendonly no\nenable-debug-command local\ndir {}\n",
         temp_root.display()

@@ -2914,6 +2958,30 @@ fn core_connection_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
     assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
 }
 
+#[test]
+fn core_debug_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
+    let cfg = HarnessConfig::default_paths();
+    let oracle_server = VendoredRedisOracle::start(&cfg);
+    let oracle = LiveOracleConfig {
+        host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+        port: oracle_server.port,
+        ..LiveOracleConfig::default()
+    };
+    let report = run_live_redis_diff_for_cases(
+        &cfg,
+        "core_debug.json",
+        CORE_DEBUG_LIVE_STABLE_CASES,
+        &oracle,
+    )
+    .expect("debug live diff");
+    assert_eq!(
+        report.total, report.passed,
+        "mismatches: {:?}",
+        report.failed
+    );
+    assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
+}
+
 #[test]
 fn core_strings_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
